title: Musical Instruments Pack
description: Adds Playable Musical Instruments to your world!
body:
# 🎵Musical Instruments pack!🎵
Adds playable instruments that you can craft!
Every instrument is played by using your camera angle, look up and down to test out!


Check the gallery to see some of the items and crafting recipes!
🎼At the moment we have a Bamboo flute, A Banjo, And guitars🎧

![Guitar and Flute in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HuBDzYkQ/images/29b7ef1fe6daac9d675110d7d8d16baa5e6bd04f.png)
![All guitars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HuBDzYkQ/images/e6cb29098fd6cc2cd5387263c724c693b2d8a3b3.png)


# 🎶Installation:🎵
### Mod version:
 Just put the .jar in the mod folder, **keep in mind that this is a datapack inside of a mod, items will not show up in the creative menu**
### Datapack version:
 This is both a Datapack and a ResourcePack, put the zip in both directories, ignore warnings


# 🎵Next Versions: Bass, Cow Bell, GameBoy, Keytar?🎵
